summary: Iteration 89: Enterprise BI Suite fully tested. All 7 backend API endpoints return HTTP 200 with valid JSON (36/36 pytest tests passed - 100%). Frontend panel opens correctly with all 4 tabs working: STR Competitive Set (MPI/ARI/RGI indices, comp set table, 12-month trend), P&L Waterfall (KPIs, waterfall chart, department P&L), Portfolio (5 property cards with LIVE badge for main property), PMS Bridge (arrivals, guest mix, 21-day OTB pace chart).
seed_data_creation: PMS reservations auto-seeded on first API call. Properties collection seeded with 5 LUCCCA properties including region field.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 89 verified Enterprise BI Suite module. Backend has 7 endpoints at /api/enterprise-bi/*: str/dashboard (STR competitive set with MPI/ARI/RGI indices), pnl/waterfall (P&L waterfall chart data), portfolio/dashboard (multi-property portfolio), pms/arrivals (today's arrivals), pms/departures (today's departures), pms/otb-pace (21-day OTB pace), pms/guest-mix (source segmentation). Frontend component at /app/client/modules/EnterpriseBISuite/index.tsx with 4 tabs: STR, P&L, Portfolio, PMS. Panel opens via sidebar click on 'Enterprise BI Suite'. Main property (prop-main) uses live MongoDB data, other properties use simulated data. STR comp set uses simulated competitor metrics.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/enterprise-bi/str/dashboard - returns 200, has period, indices (mpi/ari/rgi), comp_set array, trend_12m (12 months), insights, ranking
GET /api/enterprise-bi/pnl/waterfall - returns 200, has waterfall steps array, summary (total_revenue/gop/net_income), department_pnl
GET /api/enterprise-bi/portfolio/dashboard - returns 200, has portfolio_summary, properties array with data_source field, rankings, regions
GET /api/enterprise-bi/pms/arrivals - returns 200, has arrivals list, by_room_type, by_source, vip_arrivals, special_requests
GET /api/enterprise-bi/pms/departures - returns 200, has departures list, total_departures
GET /api/enterprise-bi/pms/otb-pace - returns 200, has 21-day pace data with rooms_otb, occupancy_otb, revenue_otb, summary
GET /api/enterprise-bi/pms/guest-mix - returns 200, has by_source and by_room_type segmentation, total_future_reservations
Portfolio main property (prop-main) uses live_mongodb data source
frontend_tests: Enterprise BI Suite panel opens from sidebar with data-testid='enterprise-bi-panel'
STR tab shows MPI (106), ARI (111.6), RGI (118.2) indices
STR tab shows competitive set table with 6 properties
STR tab shows 12-Month RGI Trend chart
STR tab shows position badges (Leading, Premium, Gaining, Rank #2 of 6)
P&L tab shows KPI cards: Total Revenue, Gross Profit, GOP, Net Income
P&L tab shows waterfall chart with colored bars
P&L tab shows Department P&L table (Rooms, F&B, Spa, Retail)
Portfolio tab shows KPI row: 5 Properties, 700 Total Rooms, $201K Revenue
Portfolio tab shows 5 property cards with LIVE badge for main property
Portfolio tab shows Occ, ADR, RevPAR, GOP margin per property
PMS tab shows arrivals KPIs: 22 arrivals, 3 VIP, 15 special requests
PMS tab shows Arrivals by Room Type breakdown
PMS tab shows Guest Mix by Source (Group, Expedia, Direct, etc.)
PMS tab shows 21-Day OTB Pace chart with 1038 room nights, $122K revenue

str_competitive_set.details: Index scores (MPI/ARI/RGI), competitive set table with 6 properties, 12-month trend, market insights, ranking

pnl_waterfall.details: Waterfall chart with revenue/cost/profit steps, KPI cards, department P&L breakdown

portfolio_dashboard.details: 5 property cards, LIVE badge for main property, KPI row, regional breakdown

pms_data_bridge.details: Arrivals/departures, room type breakdown, guest mix by source, 21-day OTB pace chart

mocked_apis.str_comp_set: Competitor hotel metrics are simulated based on main property data
mocked_apis.portfolio_non_main: Non-main properties use simulated occupancy/ADR/revenue data
mocked_apis.pms_reservations: Reservations are seeded with random data on first API call
